211 N Church St, West Chester, PA 19380, USA

3 Serviceberry trees along church st sidewalk, next to borough lot 10 and growers market. There were plenty of berries in early-mid June. They taste similar to blueberries. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
Driving directions need to say drive down Chestnut to the front door, not to the alley behind the house!, 120 E Chestnut St, West Chester, PA 19380, USA
There are a few younger serviceberry trees along the sidewalk. Because they are younger, the yield is a lot lower. They taste similar to blueberries. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
21 W Biddle St, West Chester, PA 19380, USA
Good size serviceberry tree along biddle st sidewalk near church st. Branches are somewhat high but still has reachable fruit. Tastes similar to a blueberry. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
326 N Walnut St, West Chester, PA 19380, USA

There are some serviceberry trees next to the Mary Taylor House on biddle st near the sidewalk but on private property with a few branches hanging close enough to pick. They taste similar to blueberries. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: J
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
